events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the sequence violation is that instrumentation (gauges, transmitters, relief devices) was not isolated/removed before hydrostatic pressurization began, per ASME B31.3 §345. Decision is **fail** (risk **high**) — pressurization must stop, instruments must be isolated/blinded or removed and replaced with rated test gauges, and the test re-sequenced before continuing.
